CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2002 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Deborah Lubin, CSR #3234. (212)

Off Calendar Aug-15-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to John F. kerbleski, Esq., Esq., for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 8. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar. Fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Joyce Long. (212)

MOTION For Order Discharging Plntf In Interpleader From Liability; Awarding Costs And Fees;
Off Calendar Mar-13-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Kelly J. Moynihan, Esq. 398-6000 for pltf in interpleader & moving party; William M. Lukens, Esq. 434-2264 for deft & opposing party William C. Sarsfield; John Kerbleski, Esq. 362-0520 for deft Paul W. Van Etten.
RULING: Argued and the Court grants the motion (for order discharging pltf in interpleader from liability); parties stipulate to delivery of security; and attorneys fees denied.
